cross_domain_insights.title: GraspLDP: Towards Generalizable Grasping Policy via Latent Diffusion
cross_domain_insights.abstract: This paper focuses on enhancing the grasping precision and generalization of manipulation policies learned via imitation

cross_domain_insights.label: aiapp-embodied-cross
cross_domain_insights.title: Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming
cross_domain_insights.abstract: Hi HN! My name is Rohan and, together with Paul, I’m the co-founder of OctaPulse ( https://www.tryoctapulse.com/ ). We’re building a robotics layer for seafood production, starting with automated fish
